subcodes.first_line: O Kazim! Say: My God, my God! Purify the ears of Thy servants with the waters of detachment, that they may hearken unto Thy most sweet call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا کاظم قل الهی الهی طهر آذان عبادک بماء الانقطاع لیستمعوا ندآئک الاحلی ای
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
